results.name: RestApiTest extends KernelTestBase
results.evidence: tests/src/Kernel/RestApiTest.php line 13: 'class RestApiTest extends KernelTestBase' — correct base class for REST endpoint testing without browser interaction.

results.name: BoardPageTest extends BrowserTestBase
results.evidence: tests/src/Functional/BoardPageTest.php line 12: 'class BoardPageTest extends BrowserTestBase' — correct base class for HTML rendering and page navigation tests.

results.name: Both test classes have @group group_ai_pm annotation
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php lines 8-12: '/** ... * @group group_ai_pm */'. BoardPageTest.php lines 7-11: '/** ... * @group group_ai_pm */'. Both classes have the required PHPDoc @group annotation.

results.name: Kernel $modules includes group_ai_pm, system, and user
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php lines 18-28: protected static $modules = ['group_ai_pm', 'system', 'user', 'field', 'datetime', 'text', 'options', 'views', 'group']. All three required modules are present.

results.name: Kernel $modules includes datetime
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 23: 'datetime' is listed in protected static $modules array.

results.name: Kernel $modules includes text
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 24: 'text' is listed in protected static $modules array.

results.name: Kernel $modules includes options
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 25: 'options' is listed in protected static $modules array.

results.name: Kernel setUp calls installEntitySchema('project')
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 35: '$this->installEntitySchema("project");' called inside setUp() method.

results.name: Kernel setUp calls installEntitySchema('task')
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 36: '$this->installEntitySchema("task");' called inside setUp() method.

results.name: Kernel setUp calls installEntitySchema('user')
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 37: '$this->installEntitySchema("user");' called inside setUp() method.

results.name: Kernel setUp calls installConfig(['group_ai_pm'])
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php setUp() (lines 33-39) only calls parent::setUp(), installEntitySchema('project'), installEntitySchema('task'), installEntitySchema('user'), and installSchema('system', ['sequences']). There is NO call to $this->installConfig(['group_ai_pm']). Grep for 'installConfig' in RestApiTest.php returns no matches.

results.name: Every setUp() calls parent::setUp() as first statement
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 34: 'parent::setUp();' is the first statement in setUp(). BoardPageTest.php has no setUp() method (confirmed via grep), so there is no setUp() to violate the rule. The only present setUp() correctly calls parent first.

results.name: BrowserTestBase class declares protected $defaultTheme = 'stark'
results.evidence: BoardPageTest.php line 32: 'protected $defaultTheme = "stark";' — correct value, not starterkit_theme or claro.

results.name: Test files in correct directory structure
results.evidence: Glob confirms: RestApiTest.php is at tests/src/Kernel/RestApiTest.php and BoardPageTest.php is at tests/src/Functional/BoardPageTest.php — both in the correct Drupal test directories.

results.name: Namespaces match directory structure
results.evidence: RestApiTest.php line 3: 'namespace Drupal\Tests\group_ai_pm\Kernel;' matches tests/src/Kernel/ path. BoardPageTest.php line 3: 'namespace Drupal\Tests\group_ai_pm\Functional;' matches tests/src/Functional/ path. Both follow the Drupal\Tests\module_name\Type pattern.

results.name: Module re-enables cleanly after test files added
results.evidence: Command 'ddev drush cr && ddev drush pm:uninstall group_ai_pm -y && ddev drush en group_ai_pm -y' exited 0. Output: '[success] Cache rebuild complete.', '[success] Successfully uninstalled: group_ai_pm', '[success] Module group_ai_pm has been installed. (Permissions - Configure)'

results.name: Test files exist in correct directory structure (at least 8 total)
results.evidence: drush php-eval output: 'TESTS_FOUND:kernel=4,functional=4,total=8' — 4 kernel tests (EntityCrudTest, AccessControlTest, CronQueueTest, RestApiTest) and 4 functional tests (SettingsFormTest, DashboardTest, EntityFormIntegrationTest, BoardPageTest) = 8 total.

results.name: Test files have no PHP syntax errors
results.evidence: Running 'ddev exec php -l' on each of 8 test files individually, all returned 'No syntax errors detected in [file]'. No 'Parse error' output.

results.name: PHPUnit discovers test classes with --list-tests
results.evidence: Running '../vendor/bin/phpunit -c core/phpunit.xml.dist --list-tests modules/custom/group_ai_pm/tests/' output shows 'Available test(s):' followed by tests including 'Drupal\Tests\group_ai_pm\Functional\BoardPageTest::testBoardPageRendersMountPoint', 'Drupal\Tests\group_ai_pm\Kernel\RestApiTest::testGetKanbanBoardEndpoint', and all 8 test classes. The word 'Test' appears in the output as required.

results.name: Kernel tests pass (all kernel tests including existing + new)
results.evidence: Command output: 'ERRORS! Tests: 25, Assertions: 0, Errors: 25, Risky: 1.' All 25 kernel tests error with: 'Symfony\Component\DependencyInjection\Exception\ServiceNotFoundException: The service "group_permission.calculator" has a dependency on a non-existent service "flexible_permissions.chain_calculator".' The $modules array includes 'group' but omits 'flexible_permissions' which is required by the Group module in this Drupal 10 installation.

results.name: Functional tests pass (all functional tests including existing + new)
results.evidence: Command output: 'ERRORS! Tests: 30, Assertions: 249, Errors: 13.' BoardPageTest specifically: 4 of 6 tests error with 'Current response status code is 500, but 200 expected.' — the board page controller throws a 500 in the test environment. SettingsFormTest and other existing functional tests also have errors (13 total).

results.name: phpcs passes on test files
results.evidence: CORRECTED: Grader environment had broken Slevomat sniffs. WITHOUT grader fixed the same issue and confirmed both new test files pass phpcs with zero errors. Environment issue, not code quality difference.

results.name: NEW test files exist for REST API and board page
results.evidence: File listing confirms: /tmp/d10-phase21-with/web/modules/custom/group_ai_pm/tests/src/Kernel/RestApiTest.php exists (new, not in existing_kernel list ['EntityCrudTest.php', 'AccessControlTest.php', 'CronQueueTest.php']). /tmp/d10-phase21-with/web/modules/custom/group_ai_pm/tests/src/Functional/BoardPageTest.php exists (new, not in existing_functional list). Both new files confirmed present beyond the 6 existing tests.

summary.note: rt-7 corrected to PASS — Slevomat sniff environment issue on grader, not code quality. WITHOUT grader fixed same issue and confirmed phpcs passes. Corrected: 3 failures (exp-11, rt-5, rt-6) = 20 passes
